summary: Town service notices for 2026, including spring and fall leaf pickup, utility work, and rotating street closures for repairs.

disclaimer.title: Important Notice
disclaimer.text: This is not an official publication of the City of Mt. Pulaski. Information is provided for convenience only and may not be complete or current. The City of Mt. Pulaski is not responsible for upkeep, corrections, or omissions.
